focused.command: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='scene audio requirements|residency|pin|staged admission' test/audioEngine.test.ts test/appSceneContract.test.ts test/sceneAudioReadiness.test.ts

reversePrewarm.processed: forward and reverse hot artifacts exist before the first reverse loop edge
reversePrewarm.neutral: full-source reverse hot artifact exists without a SoundTouch render
reversePrewarm.firstEdge: does not create a second reverse artifact

cases: active selection changes synchronously while audible remains gated
B to C prevents late B publication
C audio failure keeps A permanent residency
same-scene C retry publishes atomically without another selection mutation
